prompt: Create a cinematic anime-realistic background scene on a quiet Japanese suburban residential street in Chofu City, near Jindaiji-dori on a bright summer afternoon. A small elf girl with pale blue bob-cut hair, pointed ears, and a calm profile expression walks from right to left across the foreground, wearing a loose white short-sleeved knee-length dress, white socks, and brown lace-up ankle boots. She holds a rope leash attached to a white goat walking beside her; the goat has short curved horns, shaggy fur, and follows obediently in side view. Behind the goat trails a compact dark steampunk robot companion, squat and armored, made of blackened metal plates, exposed gears, pipes, bolts, red lens eyes, and little horn-like antennae, walking like a loyal mechanical pet. The street slopes gently downhill into the distance, lined with concrete block walls, hedges, small two-story houses with tiled roofs, utility poles, overhead power lines, a curved streetlamp, guardrails, drainage grates, and leafy trees casting dappled shadows on the asphalt. The background should feel like a plausible real Japanese neighborhood, with detailed perspective, distant houses and greenery, blue sky, scattered white clouds, warm sunlight, soft atmospheric haze, and highly detailed painterly rendering. Blend whimsical fantasy characters naturally into a realistic urban environment, with consistent lighting and shadows, 16:9 landscape composition, eye-level camera, wide shot, no text, no signage emphasis.
